'''''Star Wars Weekly'' 114''' is the one hundred fourteenth issue in the ''[[Star Wars Weekly]]'' series of comic reprints, published on [[April 30]], [[1980]]. It included the original story "[[Betrayal!]]"

==Contents==
*"[[Betrayal!]]"
*"Heroes of the galaxy: Man-Wolf Part 1: Weird Stone"
*"Deathlok the Demolisher Part 24: It's still alive!"
*"Tales of the Watcher: They lurk in space!"
